sentences.text: The social media ___ decides which posts appear at the top of your feed.
sentences.hint: A set of rules or steps followed by a computer to solve a problem

sentences.text: Unlike a simple website, a ___ allows other companies to build their own products and services on it.
sentences.hint: A system or service that other software or services are built on

sentences.text: Users complained that the new ___ had too many buttons and menus.
sentences.hint: The way a program looks and is arranged on screen for the user

sentences.text: The CTO warned that ___ would become a serious problem if they reached a million users without upgrading their servers.
sentences.hint: The ability of a system to handle growing amounts of work

sentences.text: Every time a user creates an account, their details are stored in a secure ___.
sentences.hint: An organized collection of data stored electronically

sentences.text: WhatsApp uses end-to-end ___ so that only the sender and receiver can read messages.
sentences.hint: The process of converting information into a secret code to prevent unauthorized access

sentences.text: Google ___ showed that most visitors left the page after less than ten seconds.
sentences.hint: The systematic analysis of data to find useful patterns

sentences.text: Amazon Web Services provides the cloud ___ that thousands of startups depend on.
sentences.hint: The basic systems and equipment needed for something to operate

sentences.text: A good ___ flow should teach new users how the app works within the first sixty seconds.
sentences.hint: The process of integrating a new user into a system or product

sentences.text: A frustrating ___ is the number one reason people uninstall apps within the first week.
sentences.hint: How a person feels when using a product, system, or service

sentences.text: The best startups ___ quickly, releasing new versions of their product every two weeks.
sentences.hint: To repeat a process, making improvements each time

sentences.text: YouTube didn't ___ creators' videos until it introduced advertising and the Partner Programme.
sentences.hint: To earn money from something, especially a product or service

sentences.text: The QA team found a ___ that made the app crash every time a user uploaded a photo.
sentences.hint: An error or flaw in a computer program that causes it to behave unexpectedly
